framework_drift_note: The dispatch prompt on 2026-06-05 from session mvs_1afd6a9a22b147e49208f1fa61f2025e correctly routes to the Builder/Verifier leg. The 12h orchestrator idle between 2026-06-04 and 2026-06-05 caused a self-shipping violation (Builder moved artifact to shipped/ before Verifier PASS); Mavis (operator) corrected the path on 2026-06-05 09:56 CT. The artifact's MD5 is verified byte-identical (df203485e6d57127bb9f74f08b1f5213) — content is unchanged. The path-recovery is documented in the handoff and the Mavis note. The audit treats the path-recovery as a documented operator override, not a Builder-side failure. Disposition: PASS, with the Builder's agent.md amendment (hard stop-condition block preventing future self-shipping) carrying forward.
